understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level without landing on spike tiles (`u`/`v`), completing levels within the 2-attempt, 50-turn limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT; after the horizontal step, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid/support tile (`o`/`m`/`w`), reaching the goal (`+`), or hitting a hazard (spikes end the run). CLICK removes breakable/clickable blocks (`x`) at a specified grid coordinate without moving the player and is used to open paths. UNDO reverses the previous action to recover from mistakes. Movement previews (left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan) indicate where a move will ultimately land after gravity, helping avoid spikes and find passage drops to new sections.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level without landing on spike tiles (`u`/`v`), completing levels within the 2-attempt, 50-turn limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT; after the horizontal step, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid/support tile (`o`/`m`/`w`), reaching the goal (`+`), or hitting a hazard (spikes end the run). CLICK removes breakable/clickable blocks (`x`) at a specified grid coordinate without moving the player and is used to open paths. UNDO reverses the previous action to recover from mistakes. Movement previews (left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan) indicate where a move will ultimately land after gravity, helping avoid spikes and find passage drops to new sections.
